title: Briny Crunchy Canadian German Sausages Hot Pot
description: A unique fusion of German sausages with the brininess of olives and the crunch of toasted bread, perfect for a Canadian winter evening. This hot pot serves as a hearty dinner for a family gathering.

ingredients.name: Canadian German Sausages
ingredients.notes: Pork and beef sausages from a local butcher or store.

ingredients.name: Olives
ingredients.notes: Green and black olives for a briny taste.

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream
ingredients.notes: For a rich and creamy sauce.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large hot pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the Canadian German sausages and cook, breaking them apart with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the toasted bread crumbs and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the green and black olives, chicken broth, heavy cream, salt, and black pepper. Bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook, covered, for 10 minutes, until the sausages are cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
